parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-486 (governance core RP16.P02 fixture/test slice, descriptor-only, risk A, 10 units RP16.P02.M06.S15-RP16.P02.M07.S02). PASS with one non-blocking P3 informational note. Verified: (1) Coverage is exact and drift-free — unit count, first/last unit, deliverable distribution {ui:1,implementation:2,failure_recovery:2,test:4,contract:1}, micro counts {M06:8,M07:2}, and row titles all agree across closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, review-baseline, registry GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP486_REQUIREMENTS, contract cp486_requirements/p02_fixture_test_slice_descriptor, validator script, and model.test.js; range is continuous with CP485 (next_subphase RP16.P02.M06.S15) and CP487 (RP16.P02.M07.S03) with no gaps/overlaps. (2) Descriptor-only / no-write / no-real-data boundaries hold — service.js, registry.js, validators.js are pure functions returning Object.freeze'd descriptors; grep over packages/governance/src and the validator script found no writeFile/appendFile/createWriteStream/spawn/exec/fetch/child_process; every contract row carries descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, raw_payload_included:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, and all no-write/no-leak attestation flags are false/true as required. (3) Claude remains a read-only, non-final approver — authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval:false, NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION.promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, enforced in code, contract, and tests. (4) Hermes patterns are deterministic evidence-only — emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, hermes_packet is a descriptor evidence packet, H16 is a validation gate, no product-runtime embedding. (5) The pack-level production_ready claim is NOT overclaimed: production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor, status:implemented_pending_review; the production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verified marker only. (6) CP178+ review-hardening preconditions are satisfied — readiness auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1446-byte valid JSON result), forbidden_review_evidence (auth failure, 0-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields) is correctly encoded; command-evidence shows all pre-review validations (node --check/--test, rp05-rp16 validates, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/rp00 validate, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, git diff --check) at exit 0, with post-review-gated commands (closeout-pack:validate etc.) correctly deferred until this review's result exists. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. The sole P3 is the expected-by-design absence of post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json) at this pre-review stage.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts correctly pending at the read-only review stage
findings.details: manifest.json required_pack_artifacts/evidence_refs list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-486/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, and review-hardening references artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-486/raw-output.json and review-receipt.json. A directory scan confirms only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist; the review-result, adjudication, construction-inspection, raw-output, and receipt files are absent. This is the correct pre-review state: pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending', valid_review_receipts is empty, and the hardening_sequence places read_only_claude_run_raw_capture -> normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation -> commit AFTER this read-only review. command-evidence notes likewise classify npm run closeout-pack:validate / review:run/normalize/receipt:validate / git diff --check --cached as post-review-gated. Therefore the absence is by design, not a defect, and the production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review status accurately reflects that adjudication and construction-inspection have not yet run.
findings.recommendation: Generate claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json from THIS accepted review output, then run the post-review-gated validations (npm run closeout-pack:validate, normalize/receipt:validate, git diff --check --cached) and confirm exactly one valid pack review receipt before committing CP00-486. Final enterprise-trust closure still requires human approval outside this receipt. No change to pack source, contract, or tests is needed.
findings.post_review_disposition: expected_by_design_non_blocking — artifacts are produced in the normalize/adjudication/inspection steps that follow this read-only review; does not block pack or goal closeout.
